Earthbound Shared

Shared domain models and utilities for the Earthbound ecosystem.

Source Code

Changelog

[2.1.0] - 2026-04-29

Added

  • New Media and Workout domain types.
  • Zod schemas for validation.

[2.0.0] - 2026-04-15

Breaking Changes

  • Migrated to JSR from NPM.
  • Changed namespace to @jmsutorus.
